title: narcissus tazetta var. orientalis
intro: Narcissus tazetta var. orientalis, commonly known as the 'Tazetta' or 'Miniature Daffodil', is a small, bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta var. orientalis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and improving respiratory health, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
